name: Seller-Provided Financing Interest Deduction

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be the payor of 'qualified residence interest' on debt incurred to acquire a residence from the person to whom the debt is owed. Must include the name, address, and TIN of the seller on the tax return.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can deduct mortgage interest paid on a residence even if the financing is provided by the seller rather than a traditional bank, provided they report the seller's identifying information.
